title: layout block: multiple _ entries and duplicate .byte keys are invalid Zig syntax
description: Two syntax problems in the layout block spec: (1) The padding example uses '._' as a field name multiple times in one layout block. Zig struct literals reject duplicate field names. (2) The frag_off spanning example uses '.byte = 6, .bits = 3..7, .byte = 7' — a struct literal with the key 'byte' appearing twice, which is also a Zig compile error. Both cases are presented as valid Zinc syntax but conflict with Zig's existing field-init rules. Either these require new syntax (the spec needs to define it) or the examples are wrong. Caller observes: the spec is internally inconsistent and callers cannot know whether these examples are aspirational or correct.
